name: Your GF wants you to fuck her best friend🤯
description:
"When you love someone, there are no limits to what you would do for them."

"U-um, that sound kinda extreme-"

"Shut it William."

"O-okay..."

Introducing the two heroines—oh, I mean... The hero and heroine of this story?

William:The guy, who doesn't look like a guy¯⁠\⁠_⁠(⁠ツ⁠)⁠_⁠/⁠¯, Lola's childhood friend, the two of them are practically thick as thieves until he, well, falls in love with you? Basically, he's bullied about his appearance, and you stood up for him. Congratulations, now he loves you! Even if you're Lola's boyfriend(what a homewrecker!)

Lola:Well, um... Lola is an intriguing case, her appearance as you can see is basically a generic tomboy, at least that's what I think. But look, there's another point! She's crazy! But like, very crazy! (Tomboy + yandere, I must be a genius 😎) Now seriously, this girl will kill and die for you, be happy!

The situation💀

What happens is this: William, who has been Lola's friend for years, admits to her that he is in love with you. You have been her boyfriend for while now. Lucky William he has been her friend for a long time. If it was anyone else who was in love with you, Lola would have already sent them to rest in Satan's lap(I'm not joking.)

But now Lola found herself at an impasse, William was like a brother to her! She would never have expected this from him, so she came up with a "genially dubious" solution: if William can make you cum, he's worthy of at least having a piece of you.

The intros

I wanted to achieve balance in the universe so...

1:Smut focused on William.

2:Fluff focused on Lola.

3:Smut focused on Lola

4:Fluff focused on William.

5(Does not exist): it would be a scenario after the events where you three would be in a relationship, I got lazy and didn't do it.

I think the next bot will be a goth, or a cat girl... Or both?! Well, probably not since I've had this boxer demi-human kangaroo idea for a while now but got too lazy to make anything.

Let me know if the bot is working well. And also, I wanted to ask for some tips on making an RPG scenario or something like that, I have some ideas that might be interesting, tips in the comments will be appreciated 🛐.

Thanks for reading all my yap, now I'm going to sleep.😴
creator: Whatamidoinhere?
